name: 3pk 10"x8" Woodland Animal Framed Wall Art - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Bring the beauty of the outdoors to your wall space with this 3-Pack Woodland Animal Framed Wall Art from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. The vertical wall art features a striking woodland animal print on paper and is set in a brown wooden frame, adding character and dimensions to your walls. Easy to display with the sawtooth back, these vertical framed art pieces are a stylish addition to any room in your home.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
